title: jules: record fuzzer learning on FFI input hardening 🌪️
summary: Explored hardening the FFI setting payloads boundary in tokmd-core by replacing .unwrap_or(args) with strict object type checks. Discovered a duplicate/superseding PR already landed this exact fix, so concluding with a learning PR instead.
proof_summary: Documented the friction of silent type fallbacks (.unwrap_or(args)) in FFI settings parsing.
rollback: Delete the newly added friction and persona notes.
